race.comment: Tough finish with the big field over the dash. REDEMPTION TIME (4) rarely wins but looks very well placed here. Just missed two back then fair last time in heavy ground in tougher. Has had 24 tries this trip for the one win - the maiden success - but won't get a better chance to add to that. BRONCO REVOLUTION (7) has been winding up strongly finishing fourth at last couple. Hot pace will suit and will be storming home. FORTYFOUR MAGNUM (3) was runner-up two back then wide throughout and safely held last time. Gets chance to atone. EL SALTO (17) has been racing in tougher grade but is well placed this line-up and has three wins from five tries this course and distance. Leading chance with any luck from the draw. SHOOTING FOR STARS (5) turned in a strong run last time and will be hard to beat with a repeat.
